column2: Provide and maintain reliable, secure, and rapid communications based on wartime requirements to support Naval Operating Forces.

column1: Naval communications must satisfy what systems?
column2: Defense Communications System (DCS) and National Communications System (NCS).
All information systems using electric or electromagnetic signals to transmit information between or among points.
All end terminal processing equipment, transmission, switching, cryptographic, and control devices used to transmit operational information in the Navy.
Unclassified but Sensitive Internet Protocol Router Network.
Navy Computer and Telecommunications Area Master Station.
